Package org.eventb.core.basis

Class Event

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.core.runtime.PlatformObject
org.rodinp.core.basis.RodinElement
org.rodinp.core.basis.InternalElement
org.eventb.core.basis.EventBElement
org.eventb.core.basis.Event
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, ICommentedElement, IConvergenceElement, IEvent, ILabeledElement, IElementManipulation, IInternalElement, IParent, IRodinElement, ISnapshotable
public class Event extends EventBElement implements IEvent
Implementation of Event-B events as an extension of the Rodin database.

This class is intended to be subclassed by clients that want to extend this internal element type.

This class should not be used in any other way than subclassing it in a database extension. In particular, clients should not use it, but rather use its associated interface IEvent.

Since:
1.0

    • hasExtended

      public boolean hasExtended() throws RodinDBException
      Description copied from interface: IEvent
      Tests whether the extended attribute value is defined or not.
      Specified by:
      hasExtended in interface IEvent
      Returns:
      whether the extended attribute value is defined or not
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • isExtended

      public boolean isExtended() throws RodinDBException
      Description copied from interface: IEvent
      Returns whether the event is extended, that is whether the abstract children are copied (in particular, parameters, guards, and actions) except refines clauses and witnesses.

      The concrete event has to set all attributes of the event and may add additional children to an extended event.

      Specified by:
      isExtended in interface IEvent
      Returns:
      true if the event is extended.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database

    • setExtended

      public void setExtended(boolean extended, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Description copied from interface: IEvent
      Marks the event as extended.
      Specified by:
      setExtended in interface IEvent
      Parameters:
      extended - the new value specifying whether this event id extended or not.
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database.

    • isInitialisation

      public boolean isInitialisation() throws RodinDBException
      Description copied from interface: IEvent
      Returns whether this event is an initialisation event. An event is an initialisation event iff its label is INITIALISATION.
      Specified by:
      isInitialisation in interface IEvent
      Returns:
      true if the event is an initialisation event
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if there was a problem accessing the database
